security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://lh3.googleusercontent.com https://drive.google.com https://drive.usercontent.google.com https://*.ggpht.com https://i.ytimg.com data: blob:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://drive.google.com https://docs.google.com https://drive.usercontent.google.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com

bundle.longDescription: A desktop application for managing player-created maps (UMT) for Tales Runner. Install, deactivate, and manage your UMT maps easily.
